title: Rookraft
description: A modpack for 1.20.6 with some of my favourite QOL and fps optimisation mods, for the best (in my opinion) experience for playing minecraft headache free.
body:
This mod pack features a wide selection of fps enhancement mods like sodium and indium alongside some improvements like faster world loading, faster quitting, etc. There's QOL mods too, like mouse tweaks, gamma utils, essential, JEI, appleskin, and more. 

I will be adding more mods to the mod pack like litematica, and Item model features for custom texture support later down the line when they release.

<details>
<summary>Highly recomended (update prerelease... kinda)</summary>
I also highly recommend installing the following utility mods. (This is supposed to substitute an update that adds them but because they aren't on modrinth just yet, download and install them manually.)

  
> 
  
> Litemantica (litematica-fabric-1.20.6-0.18.0) - a mod that makes schematics of structures that you can download (or upload) to build them easyer in your world. alltough the ui is absolutely atrocious, its a great mod to have. And if were talking about it, i will make a mod later on specifically for improving the ui of the mod to make it easyer to use.

> MiniHud (minihud-fabric-1.20.6-0.31.0) - a utility mod that makes it easy to see a lot of the hidden wirld mechanics, like slime chinks, mob spawn area, spawn chunks, etc. creat for figuring out how to build your farms and where without extarnal tools or complicated math.

>  Shulkerbox Toltip - lets you see whats inside not just your shilkerboxes (while pressing shift) but also enderchests and other items with NBT data like chests and barrels.

Once these mods pop up on modrinth ill be deleting this region of text and adding proper support for them in the mod pack.

</details>

Any bugs or suggestions you may have, please tell me. (also excuse the bad grammar, im dislexic.)

Enjoy, have fun, and don't break the game.
